# platformSaveGraph

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for platformSaveGraph

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = usePlatformSaveGraphMutation(); mutate({ input: { graphId: '<UUID>', rootHash: '<UUID>', message: '<String>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use usePlatformSaveGraphMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = usePlatformSaveGraphMutation();
mutate({ input: { graphId: '<UUID>', rootHash: '<UUID>', message: '<String>' } });
```
